title: Device Forensics: Juniper Junos — Live CLI
description: srx-perim-01 took an unscheduled commit under stolen NOC creds. Connect, walk `show configuration | display set`, `show system commit`, `show security policies` — and the `show log messages` SSH trail.

hints.text: `connect srx-perim-01`. Junos has two modes — operational (`>`) and configure (`#`). All the forensics queries here are operational.
`show configuration | display set` collapses the curly-brace tree into one set-statement per line — easy to grep with `| match`.
`show system commit` shows commit history with sequence numbers. The last commit is the one that landed the bad changes.
